basura social: social trash/reject (slang for socially inactive person)
quedar con: to make plans with / to meet up with
hacer una caminata: to go hiking / to take a walk
hacer ilusión: to excite / to thrill (to look forward to)
roza un poco: it borders on / it verges on
dar palo: to be a hassle / to be a pain (slang for feeling lazy about doing something)
se hace cuesta arriba: it becomes difficult/uphill (figurative for something hard)
quedar bien: to look good / to make a good impression
cuerpo radioactivo: radioactive body (slang for very healthy/young body)
pasar frío: to be cold / to feel cold
sudar todo: to not care about anything (literally 'to sweat everything')
tener ganas: to feel like / to want to
me da pereza: I feel lazy / I can't be bothered
hacer caso: to pay attention to / to listen to
llevar el peso: to carry the weight / to bear the burden
